## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Domain Impact
- Bounded context(s) touched:

## Migration Notes
- Schema/data migrations? (commands, rollback)

## Security Impact
- Permissions / rate limits / audit logging changes?

## Tests
- Commands + results:

## Checklist
- [ ] Non-commercial guardrails respected (no payments/monetization)
- [ ] State machine transitions validated
- [ ] Permissions enforced (RBAC + object-level)
- [ ] Audit logs added where sensitive
- [ ] Rate limits considered
- [ ] i18n/Accessibility considered (if UI)
